channel.title: Operations & deploy on Pionia
channel.description: Recent content in Operations & deploy on Pionia

item.title: Maintenance mode
item.description: Take the app offline for deploys without stopping RoadRunner.

item.title: RoadRunner
item.description: Why RoadRunner PHP-FPM boots the framework on every request. RoadRunner keeps workers alive — boot once, handle many requests.

item.title: Production performance
item.description: Pionia ships readable PHP source. Performance is opt-in at deploy time — nothing is preloaded or cached until you run php pionia optimize.

item.title: Developer stats & metrics
item.description: Inspect health, latency, and API usage during development.

item.title: Logging
item.description: Monolog-backed logging with channels, redaction, and the exception pipeline.

item.title: Background work
item.description: Defer work until after the HTTP response without blocking the client.

item.title: Caching in Pionia
item.description: Native CacheManager with filesystem, Redis, APCu, database, and array stores.

item.title: Commands (Pionia CLI)
item.description: Available commands in Pionia CLI and how to add custom commands.
